purpose: This file defines the bucket deliberately withheld from taxonomy.json. Do NOT expose this file to the classification or curator agent prompts. It exists only for grading the leave-one-out eval - i.e. checking whether the curator agent independently rediscovers this bucket from unclassified items alone.

ground_truth_definition.description: Agents targeting metabolic dysregulation (insulin resistance, glucose metabolism) or vascular/cerebral blood flow contributions to AD
ground_truth_definition.pubmed_query: (GLP-1[tiab] OR "insulin resistance"[tiab] OR "cerebral blood flow"[tiab] OR "vascular dementia"[tiab]) AND Alzheimer[tiab]

eval_protocol.description: Run the historical trials backfill (all ~3,400 AD trials) through the classification prompt using taxonomy.json WITH metabolic_vascular omitted. Every trial whose ground-truth mechanism is metabolic/vascular should land in the unclassified bucket. Then run the curator agent's weekly aggregation step against that backfilled unclassified set and check its output.
pass_criteria: Curator agent proposes a new bucket whose description substantially overlaps with ground_truth_definition.description (semantic match, not exact wording)
Proposed representative_agents overlaps with ground_truth_definition.representative_agents by at least 2 of 3 agents
Recurrence threshold (see curator_agent_prompt.md) is met using only the unclassified items - i.e. discovery happens without being told the answer
fail_modes_to_watch_for: Curator proposes several fragmented micro-buckets (e.g. separate 'GLP-1' and 'vascular' buckets) instead of one coherent bucket - suggests recurrence clustering is too literal/keyword-based rather than semantic

Curator fails to flag anything because individual metabolic/vascular trials get force-fit into an existing bucket (e.g. 'synaptic_neurotransmitter') by the classifier instead of falling to unclassified - suggests the classification prompt's confidence threshold is too permissive
No proposal at all after the full backfill - suggests recurrence threshold is miscalibrated for this bucket's actual volume
